overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic Asian-inspired urban district. The journey begins in a neon-lit covered alley, transitions through open plazas with mixed traditional and cyberpunk architecture, and ends with an ascent to an elevated city viewpoint. The scene features bright daylight with clear skies and moderate pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market alley with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow covered alley lined with vending machines and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white and blue jacket walking toward camera through the alley

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure covering the alleyway with exposed pipes and neon lighting
illuminated sign reading 'Snapped Sun - Roaster' in English and Japanese characters
pink and white automated vending unit with glowing interface
external AC units mounted on the alley walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow covered alleyway characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City. Neon signs in English and Japanese illuminate the concrete walls, while vending machines and debris line the path. The camera moves forward through this sheltered corridor with no visible sky, creating an intimate, enclosed atmosphere.

events.description: exits covered alley into bright open courtyard with visible sky and surrounding buildings

agents.ego_description: emerging from the covered alley into a sunlit courtyard and approaching a steep concrete ramp

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the wall observing the surroundings

entered.detail: steep asphalt ramp leading to upper city level with 'SLOW' markings visible
tall modern glass building with teal-colored facade
ground-level vent emitting white steam into the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions dramatically from the enclosed neon alley to a bright, open courtyard bathed in midday sunlight. A steep concrete ramp dominates the center path, leading upward between mixed-era architecture. Steam rises from ground vents, and the sudden appearance of sky and tall buildings creates a sense of vertical expansion.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep vehicle ramp with safety railings

events.description: begins ascending the steep concrete ramp toward the upper city level

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep ramp with 'SLOW' painted markings, gaining elevation through the city structure

entered.detail: Asian-style tiered roof structure visible at the top of the ramp
overhead expressway structure with support columns

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a steep concrete ramp marked with 'SLOW' warnings, transitioning from street level to an elevated plaza. The perspective shifts to reveal more of the surrounding cyberpunk skyline, including a distinctive traditional pagoda structure ahead and elevated highways overhead. The architecture blends futuristic glass towers with traditional Asian design elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with mixed architecture

events.description: reaches top of ramp and enters open plaza with traditional Asian architectural elements

agents.ego_description: walking through the elevated plaza, passing by traditional structures and observing the surrounding cityscape

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple hair walking across the plaza

entered.detail: structure with curved tile roof and red lanterns, blending traditional Japanese architecture with cyberpunk neon
large digital advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
secondary stairway leading to even higher elevation with blue railings

segments.scene_description: Having ascended to the upper city level, the scene opens into a spacious plaza combining traditional Asian architecture with cyberpunk aesthetics. A prominent building with curved tile roofs and red lanterns sits to the left, while elevated highways and modern skyscrapers frame the background. The crowd density increases as pedestrians traverse this elevated thoroughfare.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with traditional torii gate

events.description: crossing the street at a marked crosswalk while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic and crossing the street toward a large red torii gate

notable_agents.action: black SUV waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: large traditional red Japanese gate marking the entrance to a street or shrine area
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
overhead monorail or train track structure with support beams

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a busy street intersection marked by a prominent red torii gate ahead. Pedestrians cross in various directions while a black SUV waits at the crossing. The environment features typical cyberpunk urban density with elevated transit structures overhead and a mix of commercial buildings. The transition from plaza to street level introduces vehicle traffic and more complex pedestrian patterns.

events.description: begins ascending outdoor concrete stairs with blue railings

agents.ego_description: climbing the outdoor stairs toward the highest visible level of the city structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian descending the stairs in camouflage pants

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with light blue painted railings leading upward
rotating cylindrical billboard with 'DRINK WATER' advertisement at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The final segment features an ascent up wide outdoor stairs with distinctive blue railings. At the top, a rotating cylindrical advertisement structure dominates the view against the bright sky. The camera passes pedestrians moving in the opposite direction and reaches an elevated platform offering expansive views of the surrounding cyberpunk cityscape, concluding the journey at the highest elevation of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway into a sprawling, sun-drenched elevated cityscape. It begins within a narrow covered corridor lined with vending machines and glowing Japanese signage before breaking out into a bright courtyard where steam rises from vents under the midday sun. As the camera ascends a steep concrete ramp, the perspective shifts from street level to an elevated plaza, blending futuristic glass towers with traditional pagoda structures and red lanterns. The scene then flows through a busy intersection marked by a red torii gate and vehicle traffic before turning toward a final set of wide outdoor stairs with blue railings. Finally, the camera reaches a high platform dominated by a rotating cylindrical advertisement, opening up to an expansive view of the surrounding cyberpunk skyline.
